name: Homemade Spanish Rice Seasoning Mix
recipeIngredient: dash crushed red pepper -- or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir until evenly distributed.
3. Place the mixture in a foil packet or plastic bag.
4. Label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6-8 months.
Makes 1 package Homemade Spanish Seasoning Mix.
